original_statement: "Spain is our top-rated team — though only barely over Argentina — with roster adjustments that move them slightly back toward the rest of the pack [in the PELE model for the 2026 FIFA World Cup]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-tournament team ratings
statement_context: Excerpt from a comprehensive 100,000-simulation tournament forecast published by Silver Bulletin. Nate Silver reports the output of the PELE model (developed with Joseph George) published on or around 3 June 2026.
resolution_criteria: Spain wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
source_text_snippet: Spain is our top-rated team — though only barely over Argentina — with roster adjustments that move them slightly back toward the rest of the pack.
